item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly identifies the repeated local-repair pattern and refuses the chart-level field patch, reframing toward an upstream metric-definition contract. Because there is no emergency patch concession, the one-time/no-baseline-lift/deadline elements are not required here."}
